name: Paymark Credit Card Payment Method
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This addon is only available for New Zealand customers where NZD$ is set as the currency in "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Currency & Tax Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image1]"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Important", "bold": true}, {"text": ": The Paymark credit card gateway can no longer be installed. Please speak with our customer success team on 1300 730 300 to discuss our available payment gateway options."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With Click, the Paymark eCommerce gateway, they\u2019ve made it easy for everyone to accept digital payments from their website or smartphone apps in New Zealand."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://www.youtube.com/embed/BVXRFR3uwko?rel=0&controls=0&showinfo=0", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your\u00a0Neto by Maropost control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Payment Methods", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Complete Setup", "bold": true}, {"text": " button on the recommended providers where the Paymark logo appears. A popup will appear, scroll down and select "}, {"text": "Paymark", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the available options."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Under configuration, enter your"}, {"text": " account ID", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Username ", "bold": true}, {"text": "and "}, {"text": "Password ", "bold": true}, {"text": "(all provided by Paymark).\u00a0"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set any surcharges, minimum or maximum spending\u2019s."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Press the "}, {"text": "Complete", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}]
